candidates.title: FAQ About PIKE - Pi Kappa Alpha
candidates.snippet: Pike new member education culminates in Ingress- a final week of introspection and review prior to activation (or initiation into Pi Kappa Alpha as an Active Member). Ingress is a special time for a New Member to find their place in Kappa Chapter and the Fraternity as a whole.

candidates.title: About - Sigma Alpha Epsilon
candidates.snippet: Founded in 1856, SAE has a long history with over 350000 lifetime members and numerous chapters, it emphasizes "The True Gentleman" creed.
